channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 3 firefighters killed in Western wildfire were trying to shield themselves from flames
item.description: Federal officials say that the three firefighters killed over the weekend in a Colorado wildfire were part of a crew that goes into remote areas to quickly put out new fires.

item.title: Sweltering Midwest heat cancels outdoor plans as cooling centers open and the East braces
Luigi Mangione’s federal trial in UnitedHealthcare CEO’s killing postponed until January
